description: Offline payment acknowledgment system for tracking Zelle payments. Admin marks payment status; system displays instructions and sends reminders. No payment gateway.

screens.description: Admin view of all enrollment payments with status filtering

features.description: List all enrollments with payment status, amount due, and amount received

requirements.description: Dashboard lists all enrollments with columns: parent name, child name, program, amount due, amount received, payment status, payment method, last updated
requirements.acceptance_criteria: All columns are visible and sortable; list can be filtered by payment status (pending, paid, partial, waived)

screens.description: Detailed payment view for a single enrollment with admin controls

features.description: Admin can update payment status and record payment details

requirements.description: Admin can set payment status to: pending, paid, partial, waived
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Status change is saved immediately and reflected across all views

requirements.description: Admin can record: amount received, payment method, and free-text notes (e.g., 'Paid via Zelle on Jan 12')
requirements.acceptance_criteria: All fields are saved and visible on the payment detail screen

requirements.description: Payment detail shows the full price breakdown from the enrollment (base fee, registration, coupon, total)
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Price breakdown matches the enrollment record and is read-only on the payment screen

screens.description: Page displayed to parents after enrollment showing Zelle payment details

features.description: Show Zelle recipient info, amount, and reference instructions

requirements.description: Page displays: Zelle recipient name/email/phone, exact amount to pay, and a reference note to include (e.g., child name + program name)
requirements.acceptance_criteria: All payment instruction fields are configured by admin in settings and displayed accurately to the parent

business_rules.rule: Payment status defaults to 'pending' when an enrollment is created
business_rules.acceptance_criteria: Every new enrollment has payment_status = 'pending' and amount_received = 0

business_rules.rule: Admin is the only user who can change payment status
business_rules.acceptance_criteria: Parent-facing views do not have any payment status modification controls

business_rules.rule: Payment reminder automation is triggered when payment is overdue (configurable threshold, default 3 days after enrollment)
business_rules.acceptance_criteria: System sends payment reminder email when enrollment age exceeds threshold and payment_status is still 'pending'

business_rules.rule: Partial payments are tracked: admin records amount received; system calculates remaining balance
business_rules.acceptance_criteria: When amount_received < amount_due and status is 'partial', the remaining balance is displayed correctly
